## Use case

<!-- Describe the ArcGIS Pro / ArcPy workflow you want to expose through MCP
     and why the curated tool surface does not cover it today. -->

## Proposed tool name / shape

<!-- e.g. arcgis_pro_gp_xxx, arguments, return value. -->

## Safety considerations

- Does it need `ARCGIS_PRO_MCP_ALLOW_WRITE`?
- Does it read files? Which root validation applies?
- Does it write files? Which root validation applies?
- Does it touch credentials, portal connections, or long-running GP tools?
